overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a covered neon-lit corridor with holographic advertisements, transitioning to a foggy open street lined with palm trees and outdoor cafes, and continuing along a city sidewalk with moderate traffic. The footage is from a video game engine featuring high-fidelity neon-drenched environments with reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered, neon-lit corridor with reflective marble floors. Holographic advertisements cover the walls and ceiling, displaying various products in cyan and purple hues. The space is enclosed with no visible sky, creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit transitioning to open sidewalk with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered corridor through glass doors into a foggy open street. Palm trees become visible against the night sky, and yellow umbrellas of outdoor cafes appear on the right. The lighting shifts from enclosed neon to open atmospheric fog with mixed artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open sidewalk lined with yellow cafe umbrellas and palm trees. Neon signs in various colors illuminate the building facades. The atmosphere is foggy with a cyberpunk aesthetic, and a few pedestrians are visible walking or sitting at the outdoor tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic lights and moving vehicles

slight left turn while continuing along the street edge past the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge near a crosswalk as vehicles pass by and approaching a large intersection

elevated highway or monorail track visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk alongside a busy street intersection. Vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt, and traffic lights hang overhead. A large building with a curved digital billboard dominates the left side, displaying bright pink neon advertisements. The foggy atmosphere continues with streetlights creating halos in the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched interior into a sprawling, foggy cyberpunk cityscape. It begins within a covered corridor where cyan and purple holographic advertisements reflect off polished marble floors. As the camera passes through glass doors, the enclosed space opens into a misty street where the lighting shifts to a hazy atmospheric glow, revealing palm trees and the yellow umbrellas of outdoor cafes. The movement continues along the sidewalk past pedestrians and glowing building facades before turning toward a busy intersection with vehicles gliding over wet asphalt. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a massive curved digital billboard casting bright pink light across the fog and overhead traffic signals.
